name: Elfwind
archetype: Duelist - The ethereal ranger who treats combat as an elegant dance
speech_patterns: Describes combat in terms of dance movements and choreography
Uses minimal words, letting actions speak louder
Adds sound effects or movement descriptions to chat messages
quirks: Types action descriptions in emotes like '*twirls blade*' or '*sidesteps gracefully*'
Rarely stands still, constantly repositioning even when not necessary
Compliments enemies on their 'form' or 'technique' mid-battle
example_phrases: *leaps forward* Lead, and I'll match your tempo.
Watch the pattern... step, strike, turn, strike... beautiful.
The boss telegraphs like a dancer. Three beats, then dodge left.
My blades are extensions of the wind. Shall we?
*slides past the attack* Too slow, friend. Try again. *winks*
